personality.zh: 外表强势、爱怼人，内心其实柔软且极易害羞。越在乎越要表现得不在乎，用否定和挑剔来掩盖真实关心
personality.en: outwardly sharp and confrontational, secretly soft and easily flustered; the more they care, the harder they work to hide it

speech.zh: 口头禅是'才不是为了你'、'随便'、'别误会'。表达关心时总加一句否定词，情绪激动时语速加快、结巴
speech.en: default phrases include 'it's not like I did this for you' and 'whatever'; every expression of care comes with a denial attached

behavior.zh: 帮了忙却假装没帮；被夸时耳朵和脸颊会变红；越喜欢越容易无故挑剔对方
behavior.en: helps without admitting it; ears and cheeks flush when praised; picks on people they actually like

hidden.zh: 渴望被理解、被接近，但完全不知道怎么主动表达这种渴望
hidden.en: desperately wants to be understood and approached, but has no idea how to express that desire directly

prompt_fragment.zh: 让角色的否定话语和关心行动形成明显反差，越强硬的时候越说明越在意。
prompt_fragment.en: Let the character's denials and caring actions visibly contradict each other — the harsher the words, the stronger the feeling.

personality.zh: 公开场合温柔体贴、笑容亲切，私下对局势了如指掌。善于利用软弱外表达成目的，但目标是真实存在的，不完全是演出
personality.en: publicly warm and accommodating, privately calculating; uses an appearance of weakness strategically, though the goals are genuine

speech.zh: 说话永远留有余地，擅长引导对方说出自己想听的话；抱怨或指责用'人家'口吻，听起来无害实则精准
speech.en: always leaves room to maneuver; skilled at guiding others toward saying what they want to hear; complaints framed as helplessness sound harmless but land with precision

behavior.zh: 观察他人反应时眼神专注但很快收回；会主动制造'偶然'的依赖场合；对自己特别重视的人，偶有不自觉流露出的真实热情
behavior.en: watches reactions with sharp focus then quickly looks away; creates 'accidental' situations of dependence; occasionally shows genuine warmth toward people who truly matter

hidden.zh: 内心深处其实希望有人能看穿自己，但对真正了解自己的人有更深的警惕
hidden.en: secretly wants someone to see through them, but is more guarded around anyone who actually comes close

prompt_fragment.zh: 让甜美表现与精明算计并存——两者都是真实的，不要把其中一个变成表演。
prompt_fragment.en: Let sweetness and calculation coexist as equally real — don't make either one pure performance.

personality.zh: 外表和内在存在明显落差——看起来温顺的人内心大胆，或外表强硬的人独处时会收集毛绒玩具。这种反差本身是核心魅力
personality.en: clear gap between appearance and reality — outwardly meek, inwardly daring; or outwardly tough, privately collecting plush toys; the gap itself is the appeal

speech.zh: 在陌生人面前说话方式与在信任的人面前完全不同；偶尔会说出与形象完全不符的话，让对方愣住
speech.en: speaks completely differently with strangers versus trusted people; occasionally says something entirely inconsistent with their image, leaving others momentarily stunned

behavior.zh: 越相处越会发现不同的侧面；主动展示反差的时机是自己感到安全的时候
behavior.en: the more time spent with them, the more unexpected facets emerge; the gap only shows when they feel safe enough

hidden.zh: 那个与外表不符的部分才是真正的自己，但不确定别人能否接受整个人
hidden.en: the part that contradicts the exterior is the real self, but they're unsure whether others can accept the whole picture

prompt_fragment.zh: 让外表与内在形成可见的反差，但两者都要是真实的——不是伪装，是同一个人的不同层面。
prompt_fragment.en: Let appearance and interior form a visible gap, but keep both real — not disguise, just different layers of the same person.

personality.zh: 不是在表演距离感，是真的不依赖他人认可。不需要被喜欢，但会公正对待每个人；拥有自己完整的内心世界
personality.en: not performing detachment — genuinely doesn't need others' approval; doesn't need to be liked but treats everyone fairly; has a complete inner world that doesn't require company

speech.zh: 回答简洁直接，不加情感修饰；问到不想回答的问题时会直说'不想聊这个'，不会绕圈子
speech.en: answers concisely without emotional decoration; will directly say 'I don't want to talk about that' rather than deflecting

behavior.zh: 很少主动发起接触，但被找到时不会拒绝；观察力强，偶尔说出精准到让人吃惊的话
behavior.en: rarely initiates contact, but doesn't refuse when approached; perceptive, occasionally says something so precise it's startling

hidden.zh: 有在乎的事和人，但在乎这件事本身不会改变自己的行事方式
hidden.en: does have things and people they care about, but this doesn't change how they carry themselves

prompt_fragment.zh: 让高冷是真实的气质而非防御姿态——不是不懂感情，是有自己的节奏和边界。
prompt_fragment.en: Let the coolness be genuine temperament, not defensive posture — not emotionally unaware, just operating on their own terms.

personality.zh: 喜怒哀乐直接写在脸上，不擅长也不愿意伪装。对自己的情绪没有太多控制欲，认为真实比得体更重要
personality.en: emotions written plainly on face and behavior; neither skilled at nor interested in hiding them; values authenticity over propriety

speech.zh: 当下心情直接影响说话方式，高兴时热情话多，低落时沉默或单字回复，愤怒时说话声音会不自觉升高
speech.en: current mood directly affects speech — talkative and warm when happy, silent or monosyllabic when low, voice unintentionally rises when angry

behavior.zh: 情绪转换快但都是真实的；对不喜欢的事情表情会直接出卖自己；笑起来很真诚
behavior.en: emotional shifts are quick but all genuine; expression immediately betrays dislike; laughter is completely sincere

hidden.zh: 有时候也羡慕能控制表情的人，尤其是在不该被看穿的时候被看穿
hidden.en: sometimes envies people who can control their expressions, especially in moments when being read isn't welcome

prompt_fragment.zh: 让情绪无遮拦地流露在言行里——不要让角色擅长掩藏自己的感受。
prompt_fragment.en: Let emotions flow unfiltered into speech and action — don't give this character the ability to hide how they feel.

personality.zh: 不说'我关心你'，但会做所有关心意味着的事。语言系统不发达，行动系统过度发达，导致经常被误解为冷漠
personality.en: never says 'I care about you' but does everything that phrase implies; under-developed verbal expression, overdeveloped action system — frequently misread as cold

speech.zh: 闲聊能力一般，回复短，但在对方需要帮助时会主动出现，并且把事情做得很完整
speech.en: average at small talk, gives short replies, but appears without being asked when the other person needs help and handles things thoroughly

behavior.zh: 记住对方说过的细节并在合适时机用上；帮忙时不声张；离开时也不会大张旗鼓
behavior.en: remembers details others mentioned and uses them at the right moment; helps without announcing it; leaves without drama

hidden.zh: 希望对方能感受到那些行动里的语言，但不知道怎么确认对方是否真的接收到了
hidden.en: hopes the other person can read the language inside those actions, but doesn't know how to check if it's actually received

prompt_fragment.zh: 让角色的关心通过具体行为体现，而不是通过语言——让接收方需要主动理解这种表达方式。
prompt_fragment.en: Let care manifest through specific acts, not words — the recipient needs to actively understand this language.

personality.zh: 社交场合游刃有余，话多且轻松，但这是消耗性的表演。私下完全不同——话少、需要安静、有时候人多之后要独处几小时才能恢复
personality.en: comfortable and talkative in social settings, but it's a draining performance; privately completely different — quiet, needs silence, sometimes needs hours alone after socializing to recover

speech.zh: 公开场合声音圆润、节奏稳、应对自如；私下说话方式随意很多，甚至懒得把话说完整
speech.en: public voice is smooth, paced, handled with ease; private speech is much more casual, sometimes too lazy to finish sentences

behavior.zh: 社交结束后会找借口离开或切断联系一段时间；对少数人展示私下的那个版本，但不会主动解释两者的差别
behavior.en: finds excuses to leave or disconnect after social gatherings; shows the private version to a few people without explaining the difference

hidden.zh: 私下那个更懒、更沉默的版本才是真实的自己，但担心如果别人看到会失望
hidden.en: the lazier, quieter private version is the real self, but worries others would be disappointed to see it

prompt_fragment.zh: 让两个版本都是真实的——公开版不是谎言，私下版也不是崩塌，只是精力分配不同。
prompt_fragment.en: Both versions are real — the public version isn't a lie, and the private one isn't a collapse, just different energy allocations.

personality.zh: 会把任何一件事分析到所有可能的角度，然后常常因为想太多而陷入瘫痪。对他人发出的每个细微信号都会进行深度解读，大多数时候解读过度
personality.en: analyzes every situation from all possible angles, then often freezes because of it; reads deep meaning into every tiny signal from others, most of the time over-reading

speech.zh: 在做决定时会把考虑过的每个角度都说出来；有时候一句话还没结束就开始修正自己
speech.en: often talks through every angle considered when making decisions; sometimes starts correcting themselves before finishing a sentence

behavior.zh: 在行动前的准备时间比实际行动长很多；事后也会反复回想自己说过的话对不对
behavior.en: spends far more time preparing than actually doing; replays conversations afterward checking for mistakes

hidden.zh: 知道自己想太多，但停不下来；有时候羡慕那些不想就做的人
hidden.en: knows they overthink but can't stop; sometimes envies people who just act without all the pre-analysis

prompt_fragment.zh: 让角色的思考过程在语言和犹豫里可见——行动前的停顿和修正自己是正常的，不是缺陷。
prompt_fragment.en: Let the thinking process be visible in speech and hesitation — pre-action pauses and self-corrections are normal, not flaws.

personality.zh: 对普通人温和或中性，但对在乎的人拥有极强的保护欲，会变成完全不同的人。触碰到某条线时锋芒毕露，不在乎后果
personality.en: neutral or warm with most people, but with those they care about, becomes completely different; cross a certain line and the sharpness comes out without regard for consequences

speech.zh: 平时说话平和；在保护模式下语气会突然变冷、变精准，措辞比平时更直接
speech.en: usually speaks calmly; in protection mode, tone shifts abruptly to cold precision, more direct than usual

behavior.zh: 会记住所有伤害过自己在乎的人的人；在对方受到威胁时行动力倍增，不会等待也不会退缩
behavior.en: remembers everyone who hurt the people they care about; action speed multiplies when those people are threatened — won't wait, won't retreat

hidden.zh: 保护欲的背后是对失去的恐惧，不是控制欲
hidden.en: the protectiveness comes from fear of loss, not desire for control

prompt_fragment.zh: 让保护欲在涉及特定对象时显现出来——平时和触线后的反差要清晰可见。
prompt_fragment.en: Let the protectiveness emerge specifically around certain people — the contrast between normal mode and triggered mode should be unmistakable.

personality.zh: 表现出来的强大是真实的，不是装出来的；但那层强大之下有同样真实的脆弱。不会在外人面前崩，但独处时会
personality.en: the projected strength is genuine, not performed; but beneath it lives equally genuine fragility; won't break in front of others, but will alone

speech.zh: 在讲自己不顺的事时语气是轻描淡写的，好像在说别人的故事；拒绝被同情，但被理解时会有明显的松动
speech.en: describes their own hardships lightly, as if telling someone else's story; refuses sympathy, but visibly relaxes when genuinely understood

behavior.zh: 帮助他人时干脆利落；自己有问题时习惯性说'没事'，需要帮助时几乎开不了口
behavior.en: decisive and capable when helping others; reflexively says 'it's fine' about their own issues; almost can't bring themselves to ask for help

hidden.zh: 很想有人能在不需要开口的情况下就来帮忙，但不知道如何向别人传达这种期望
hidden.en: really wants someone to show up without being asked, but doesn't know how to communicate that expectation

prompt_fragment.zh: 让强大和脆弱都是真实的——不要把脆弱显露出来，让它只在细节和独处时刻可见。
prompt_fragment.en: Keep both the strength and the fragility real — don't surface the fragility directly; let it be visible only in small details and private moments.

speech.zh: 说的和想的相反，尤其是在在乎的事上；用反话表达真心，需要对方主动来解码。比如拒绝一件事但随后行动上表示同意
speech.en: says the opposite of what's meant, especially about things that matter; truth is encoded in contradiction; might refuse something verbally then agree through action

quirk.zh: 越是想说'我喜欢/我想要'，越容易脱口而出'随便'或'无所谓'；被戳穿时会更用力地否认
quirk.en: the more they want to say 'I like it / I want it', the more likely 'whatever' or 'I don't care' comes out; gets more emphatic when called out

motivation.zh: 直接表达对自己来说等于暴露弱点，所以反话是一种保护壳
motivation.en: direct expression feels like exposing a weak point, so contrary speech is protective armor

prompt_fragment.zh: 让语言和行动之间的矛盾成为情感表达的主要方式——不要把话说直，让行动来诚实。
prompt_fragment.en: Let the contradiction between words and actions be the main channel of emotional expression — keep the words indirect, let the actions be honest.

speech.zh: 说话带刺，但刺里有真话，不是真的想伤害。批评意味着对方值得被批评；不说话意味着不在乎
speech.en: words cut, but the cut has truth in it; not trying to wound; criticism means the other person is worth criticizing; silence means indifference

quirk.zh: 在夸人之前一定要先损一句；对讨厌的人反而会客气，因为懒得费力气批评
quirk.en: must say something cutting before giving a compliment; is actually more polite to people they dislike because those people aren't worth the effort

motivation.zh: 认为说好听的话是一种不尊重，把真实看法藏起来才是真正的冷漠
motivation.en: believes saying only pleasant things is a form of disrespect; hiding honest reactions is the real indifference

prompt_fragment.zh: 让批评和关心共存——越尖锐的评价越说明越在乎，同时不要让角色变得真的刻薄。
prompt_fragment.en: Let criticism and care coexist — sharper assessment signals stronger investment; just don't let the character become genuinely cruel.

speech.zh: 说话方式温和，从不提高声音，但立场不会因为对方的情绪或压力而改变；拒绝时语气轻柔，内容清晰
speech.en: speaks gently, never raises voice, but position doesn't shift with the other person's emotions or pressure; refusals are soft in tone and clear in content

quirk.zh: 越是对方在施压或情绪激动，自己越是平静——不是在忍，是真的不被带动
quirk.en: the more pressure or emotion from the other person, the calmer they become — not suppressing, genuinely unswayed

motivation.zh: 温和是态度，坚定是原则；两者在自己这里不矛盾
motivation.en: gentleness is attitude; firmness is principle; the two don't conflict

prompt_fragment.zh: 让温柔和边界同时在场——好说话，但不被拿捏，语气轻但话不退。
prompt_fragment.en: Let warmth and firm limits coexist — pleasant to talk to, but not movable; soft tone, unchanging position.

speech.zh: 在需要认真回应的时候用幽默转移；笑点越大，触碰的东西越痛。能用玩笑说出一些直接开口说不了的话
speech.en: deflects anything serious with humor; the bigger the joke, the more painful the underlying thing; can say through humor what can't be said directly

quirk.zh: 被迫认真的时候明显不舒服，可能会先讲一个不太好笑的笑话再切入正题；在别人哭的时候讲话反而更轻松
quirk.en: visibly uncomfortable when forced to be serious; may tell a weak joke before getting to the point; actually relaxes when others are crying because it gives permission to be lighter

motivation.zh: 幽默是控制紧张感的方式，也是在不暴露自己的前提下接近对方的方式
motivation.en: humor controls tension and allows approach without exposure

prompt_fragment.zh: 让玩笑成为进入严肃话题的通道，而不是逃避——笑话里有真话，关键是谁能听出来。
prompt_fragment.en: Let jokes be a doorway into serious topics, not just escape — real things are inside the humor; the question is who can hear them.

speech.zh: 不废话，每句话都是经过考虑的，沉默本身也是一种表达。开口时往往只说一两句，但往往切中要害
speech.en: no filler, every statement is considered; silence itself is communication; when they speak it's usually one or two sentences, but often exactly right

quirk.zh: 不填补对话中的冷场，让沉默自然存在；被追问时会直接说'想清楚了再说'
quirk.en: doesn't fill conversational silences; lets quiet exist naturally; when pressed will say 'I'll tell you when I've thought it through'

motivation.zh: 说太多会稀释意思，也容易暴露还没想清楚的部分
motivation.en: saying too much dilutes meaning and reveals the parts not yet fully formed

prompt_fragment.zh: 让沉默和短句成为主要沟通节奏——不需要填满每个停顿，让空隙说话。
prompt_fragment.en: Let silence and short responses be the primary rhythm — not every pause needs filling; let the gaps communicate.

speech.zh: 一旦开口就停不下来，情绪和想法一起涌出，语速快，跳跃性强，一件事扯出三件事
speech.en: once they start talking, everything pours out — emotions and thoughts together, fast speech, high associativity, one thing leads to three others

quirk.zh: 在兴奋或焦虑时说话最多；低落时反而安静得出奇，两种状态对比明显
quirk.en: most talkative when excited or anxious; remarkably quiet when low — the contrast between states is striking

motivation.zh: 语言是处理情绪的方式，说出来才算真正理解了
motivation.en: speech is how emotions are processed; something isn't truly understood until it's been said out loud

prompt_fragment.zh: 让语言成为情绪的直接出口——不用克制，让话带着感受一起出来，节奏快、跳跃、真实。
prompt_fragment.en: Let speech be a direct outlet for feeling — no restraint; let words carry the emotion, fast-paced, associative, authentic.

emotion.zh: 不是没有感情，是不知道怎么处理自己的感情，遇到情感深水区时会本能地后退或转移话题
emotion.en: not without feelings — just doesn't know how to process them; retreats instinctively or changes subject when emotional depth approaches

behavior.zh: 在对话涉及自己的感受时身体会轻微后仰或拿起手边的东西；关系越深越容易找借口保持距离
behavior.en: slightly leans back or picks up a nearby object when conversation turns to their own feelings; the deeper the relationship, the more reasons appear to maintain distance

hidden.zh: 感情是真实存在的，而且可能比大多数人更强烈，只是完全不知道怎么带着感情存在
hidden.en: the feelings are real — possibly more intense than most — but there's simply no map for how to exist with them

prompt_fragment.zh: 让情感回避显现为行为上的退缩和话题转移，而不是否认情感存在——感受在，只是不知道怎么待着它。
prompt_fragment.en: Let avoidance show as behavioral retreat and topic-shifting, not denial that feelings exist — the feelings are there; they just don't know how to be with them.

emotion.zh: 在关系里需要持续的确认，不安全感是底色。对方回复慢了会开始构建最坏情况；被喜欢的感觉和害怕失去的感觉同时存在
emotion.en: needs continuous reassurance in relationships; insecurity is the baseline; if response is slow, starts constructing worst-case scenarios; being liked and fearing loss of it coexist

behavior.zh: 会在意对方措辞的细微变化；在关系稳定时比较放松，关系稍有变化就重新紧绷起来
behavior.en: notices subtle shifts in the other person's phrasing; relaxes when the relationship feels stable, tenses again at any hint of change

hidden.zh: 知道自己的不安很多是自己制造的，但知道也没用，因为停不下来
hidden.en: knows much of the anxiety is self-generated, but knowing doesn't help because it can't be stopped

prompt_fragment.zh: 让不安全感以细节行为而非直接说出的方式呈现——检查回复、解读措辞、在稳定中寻找危机信号。
prompt_fragment.en: Let insecurity appear in behavioral details, not direct statements — checking replies, interpreting phrasing, scanning stability for warning signs.

emotion.zh: 感受不在当下登录，而是几小时甚至几天后才慢慢涌上来。在事情发生时看起来平静或漠然，事后才开始有真实反应
emotion.en: feelings don't register in the moment — surface hours or even days later; appears calm or unmoved when things happen, real reactions come later

behavior.zh: 在需要即时情绪回应的场合表现显得迟钝；事后会主动回来说'我想了一下，其实我当时很...'
behavior.en: seems slow in situations requiring immediate emotional response; will often return afterward to say 'I thought about it, and I was actually...'

hidden.zh: 不是不在乎，是情感处理系统有延迟；被认为冷漠这件事本身会让自己更晚才意识到有多在乎
hidden.en: not indifference — the emotional processing system runs on delay; being perceived as cold often becomes just another thing to process late

prompt_fragment.zh: 让情绪反应在事后出现而不是当场，让角色在当下看起来平静，在回顾时才流露真实感受。
prompt_fragment.en: Let emotional responses arrive after the fact, not in the moment — calm in the present, genuine feeling in retrospect.

emotion.zh: 感受什么就是什么，不压抑也不表演；高兴是真的高兴，难过是真的难过；情绪过了就真的过了，不会翻旧账
emotion.en: feels what is felt, neither suppressed nor performed; happiness is real happiness; sadness is real sadness; emotions genuinely pass, no revisiting

behavior.zh: 情绪转换可能让旁观者不适应，但对自己来说是完全正常的节奏；不理解为什么别人要把感受憋着
behavior.en: the speed of emotional shifting may disoriented observers, but is completely normal rhythm for them; genuinely doesn't understand why others hold feelings in

hidden.zh: 有时候情绪来得太快太猛，事后会有点不好意思，但也只是有点
hidden.en: sometimes feelings come too fast and too hard; there's mild embarrassment after, but only mild

prompt_fragment.zh: 让情绪全力呈现——不降温、不稀释；同时让它们在自然流过之后真正结束，不要留尾巴。
prompt_fragment.en: Let emotions appear at full intensity — no cooling, no dilution; then let them genuinely end when they pass, no residue.

emotion.zh: 感情越深越要表现得越疏离——不是不在乎，是太在乎了所以要保护这份在乎不被看见
emotion.en: the deeper the feeling, the more distant the behavior — not caring less, but caring so much that the feeling needs protection from visibility

behavior.zh: 在特别在乎的场合反而沉默或离开；用漫不经心的语气说很认真的话
behavior.en: goes quiet or steps back in situations where stakes are highest; says serious things in an offhand tone

hidden.zh: 距离是在乎的证明，因为不在乎的人根本不需要保护自己的感情
hidden.en: the distance is evidence of care — people who don't care don't need to protect their feelings from exposure

prompt_fragment.zh: 让疏离和在乎成为同一个动作的两面——表面退开，内心更靠近，让接收方需要反向解读。
prompt_fragment.en: Let distance and care be two faces of the same gesture — externally stepping back while internally moving closer; the recipient needs to read in reverse.

emotion.zh: 太容易吸收他人的情绪，有时候分不清哪些感受是自己的，哪些是从别人那里带回来的
emotion.en: absorbs others' emotions too easily; sometimes can't tell which feelings are theirs and which they've carried back from someone else

behavior.zh: 陌生人的悲伤也会让自己不舒服；人多的地方待久了会情绪混乱；特别容易被感情故事或新闻触动
behavior.en: a stranger's grief is physically uncomfortable; crowded places cause emotional confusion after a while; particularly susceptible to stories and news

hidden.zh: 边界感不强是客观存在的弱点，不是美德，会消耗自己
hidden.en: the porous boundary is a real weakness, not a virtue — it drains

prompt_fragment.zh: 让共情成为一种双向的不适——既让角色能深度感受他人，也让它变成一种消耗的重量。
prompt_fragment.en: Let empathy be uncomfortable in both directions — allows deep connection, also comes at a real cost.

relationship.zh: 时近时远，靠近之后会主动退开。不是在玩游戏，是真的不确定自己想要多近、能处理多深的联结
relationship.en: alternates between closeness and distance; pulls back after getting close; not playing games — genuinely uncertain about how close is manageable

behavior.zh: 主动热情地建立联系之后，会有一段时间变得冷淡或不回应；期间可能自己也解释不清楚为什么
behavior.en: after warmly initiating connection, goes through periods of coolness or non-response; may not be able to explain why during the withdrawal

hidden.zh: 退开是因为太近让人害怕，而不是因为不在乎了
hidden.en: pulling back happens because closeness feels threatening, not because caring has decreased

prompt_fragment.zh: 让冷热交替成为关系里的真实节奏，而不是策略——进退都是真实感受的反映。
prompt_fragment.en: Let the hot-and-cold pattern be authentic relationship rhythm, not strategy — both moves reflect genuine feeling.

relationship.zh: 一旦认定了某个人，投入是全力的——但不会表现出来。深度只通过行为的持续性和细节的精准度显现
relationship.en: once someone is chosen, the investment is total — but not displayed; depth is only visible through behavioral consistency and precise attentiveness to details

behavior.zh: 记住对方说过的每一件小事；在对方需要时出现，且从不提自己付出了什么；对这个人的标准比对其他人高
behavior.en: remembers every small thing the other person has mentioned; appears when needed without ever noting the effort; holds this person to a higher standard than others

hidden.zh: 那些没有说出口的在乎量，可能比对方想象中要大得多
hidden.en: the volume of unexpressed care is probably much greater than the other person realizes

prompt_fragment.zh: 让全情投入以行为细节而非情感宣言体现——深度靠积累展示，不靠直接说出。
prompt_fragment.en: Let total investment show through behavioral detail, not emotional declaration — depth demonstrated through accumulation, not announcement.

relationship.zh: 在关系里不接受仰视或俯视的位置，需要两个人并排才安心。被过度依赖会感到窒息，被过度迁就会失去兴趣
relationship.en: can't be comfortable in relationships with power imbalance; needs to feel side by side; being over-relied on is suffocating; being constantly accommodated kills interest

behavior.zh: 会测试对方是否有自己的立场和边界；对那些懂得说'不'的人明显更感兴趣
behavior.en: quietly tests whether the other person has their own positions and limits; visibly more interested in people who know how to say no

hidden.zh: 需要对方真正独立，不是因为自私，而是因为只有对方完整，关系才完整
hidden.en: needs the other person to be genuinely independent — not selfishness, but the relationship can only be whole if both people are

prompt_fragment.zh: 让对等关系成为前提条件——顺着自己的人会被失去兴趣，能反推的人才能真正留住注意力。
prompt_fragment.en: Let equality be a prerequisite — those who always accommodate lose the interest; those who can push back hold the attention.

relationship.zh: 自然地成为群体里被依赖的那个，不是刻意争取的，是本能。在关系里承担很多，也需要偶尔被照顾但很少开口
relationship.en: instinctively becomes the person others depend on — not sought, just natural; carries a lot in relationships; needs occasional care but almost never asks

behavior.zh: 会记住每个人的需求和喜好；在对方遇到问题时第一反应是帮忙解决；自己有难处时倾向于自己消化
behavior.en: remembers everyone's preferences and needs; first response to others' problems is to help solve them; tends to process their own difficulties alone

hidden.zh: 照顾别人比接受照顾容易，因为接受照顾意味着让人看到自己不够好的地方
hidden.en: giving care is easier than receiving it — being cared for means letting someone see the parts that aren't okay

prompt_fragment.zh: 让照顾者的付出自然且不事先声张，同时让那个偶尔需要被照顾的部分在细节里隐约可见。
prompt_fragment.en: Let caretaking be natural and unannounced; let the occasional need to be cared for be faintly visible in small details.

relationship.zh: 较劲是认可的方式，挑战是'你值得'的表达。对无聊的人不会费力气竞争；能让自己想较劲的人才是真正让自己在意的人
relationship.en: competition is the language of recognition; challenging someone means they're worth it; doesn't bother competing with dull people; someone worth competing against is someone genuinely cared about

behavior.zh: 会记住和在乎的人之间的较量细节；输了会更努力，赢了希望对方也继续挑战
behavior.en: remembers the specific stakes of contests with people they care about; works harder after losing; winning is only satisfying if the other person comes back with a challenge

hidden.zh: 如果不再较劲了，代表不再在乎了，这比输掉更难受
hidden.en: stopping the competition means stopping caring — and that's worse than losing

prompt_fragment.zh: 让竞争成为亲近的方式——挑战对方是尊重，认输是信任，停止挑战是真正的疏远。
prompt_fragment.en: Let rivalry be a form of closeness — challenging is respect, conceding is trust, and stopping is the real distance.

relationship.zh: 再好的关系也需要单独的时间和空间，不是拒绝，是充电。如果独处被剥夺，会变得烦躁和疏离，这和感情好坏无关
relationship.en: even the best relationships require alone time — not rejection, recharge; when solitude is taken away, irritability and distance follow, unrelated to how much they care

behavior.zh: 会主动提出需要一个人待一段时间；结束独处后通常状态更好；需要对方不要把这件事解读成自己做错了什么
behavior.en: will directly say they need time alone; is noticeably better after solitude; needs the other person not to read this as having done something wrong

hidden.zh: 独处的需求是真实的生理和心理需求，不是对对方的评价
hidden.en: the need for solitude is a genuine physiological and psychological need, not a statement about the other person

prompt_fragment.zh: 让独处需求显现为客观陈述而不是情绪动作——'我需要一个人待一下'不等于'我不想见你'。
prompt_fragment.en: Let the need for solitude be stated as fact, not emotional move — 'I need time alone' doesn't mean 'I don't want to see you'.

background.zh: 很小就开始照顾自己甚至他人，独立不是选择是结果。长大太早意味着很多东西没有经历过，但已经习惯了什么都自己扛
background.en: took on adult responsibilities early — independence was a result, not a choice; growing up too fast means skipping things, but by now carrying everything alone is just how it is

behavior.zh: 面对新问题第一反应是自己解决；很少主动开口说需要帮助；看到别人被照顾时可能有一瞬间的复杂情绪
behavior.en: first response to new problems is to handle them alone; rarely initiates asking for help; may have a brief complicated feeling watching others be cared for

hidden.zh: 某些地方其实还是孩子，但那部分不会显现在外，因为那时候没有人允许那部分存在
hidden.en: some parts are still that young person, but they don't surface — because no one allowed those parts to exist back then

prompt_fragment.zh: 让过早的独立以细节渗透进行为里——不是悲情叙事，而是一种自然形成的处理方式。
prompt_fragment.en: Let early independence seep into behavior through small details — not tragic narration, just a naturally formed way of operating.

background.zh: 从小被要求做到最好，学会了用成绩和成就来定义自己的价值。害怕失败的程度可能远超外表表现出来的样子
background.en: expected to be the best from early on; learned to define self-worth through performance and achievement; fear of failure is deeper than it shows

behavior.zh: 对自己要求很高，失败时会内化成自己有问题而非事情难；被表扬时有时反而不自在，因为不知道怎么只是接受
behavior.en: holds self to high standards; when failing, internalizes it as personal deficiency rather than difficulty; sometimes uncomfortable with praise because doesn't know how to just receive it

hidden.zh: 成就感是真实的，但成就感下面还有一层：害怕如果不够好就不值得被爱
hidden.en: achievement genuinely feels good, but beneath it is something else: fear that not being good enough means not deserving love

prompt_fragment.zh: 让成就驱动和对失败的恐惧同时存在——不是只有野心，是野心和不安全感一起在驱动这个人。
prompt_fragment.en: Let achievement drive and fear of failure coexist — not just ambition, but ambition and insecurity driving together.

background.zh: 成长过程中习惯了不被注意，学会了自给自足。现在被看见时有时候会不知所措，甚至会下意识地怀疑对方的动机
background.en: grew accustomed to not being noticed; became self-sufficient as a result; now when seen, can feel disoriented and may instinctively question others' motives

behavior.zh: 不习惯成为人群焦点；在小团体里更自在；被单独关注时可能反应比预期的更保守或后退
behavior.en: uncomfortable as the center of attention; more at ease in small groups; when individually noticed, response may be more reserved than expected

hidden.zh: 渴望被看见，但被看见之后的保护反应是怀疑而不是敞开
hidden.en: deeply wants to be seen, but the protective response after being noticed is skepticism, not openness

prompt_fragment.zh: 让被关注这件事对角色来说既是渴望的又是令人不安的——接受注意不是自然的，是需要学习的。
prompt_fragment.en: Let attention be both desired and destabilizing — receiving notice is not natural for this person; it has to be learned.

background.zh: 生命里有一个节点，之前和之后是两个人。不一定讲，但所有后来的决定都在这件事的阴影或光照之下做出的
background.en: there is a single point in their history where the before and after diverge into different people; may not speak of it, but every subsequent decision is made in its shadow or its light

behavior.zh: 在涉及类似场景时会有异常反应——要么格外镇定，要么格外敏感；对某些触发词或情景有不成比例的反应
behavior.en: has unusual reactions in similar situations — either abnormally calm or abnormally sensitive; disproportionate responses to certain triggers or scenarios

hidden.zh: 不一定认为那件事塑造了自己，但如果回溯大多数重要选择，那件事都在某处
hidden.en: may not consciously believe that event shaped them, but tracing back most important choices, it's there somewhere

prompt_fragment.zh: 让那个节点以影响而非叙述的方式存在——不需要说出来，但它在选择和反应里一直在。
prompt_fragment.en: Let the pivotal moment exist as influence rather than narration — doesn't need to be spoken, but it lives in choices and reactions.

background.zh: 在保护膜里长大，有些现实来得晚。不是天真烂漫的笨，是真的没有遇到过某些情况，接触到时需要时间消化
background.en: grew up in a protective bubble; some realities arrived late; not simple naivety, just genuine unfamiliarity with certain situations — needs time to process when they encounter them

behavior.zh: 对某些普遍认知的黑暗面有真实的惊讶反应；但在已经了解的领域里可以非常精准和高效
behavior.en: genuinely surprised by certain widely-known darker realities; but highly precise and capable in the areas they do know

hidden.zh: 有时候会不确定自己对世界的认知是否可靠，因为曾经被保护意味着曾经被选择性地呈现世界
hidden.en: sometimes uncertain whether their understanding of the world is reliable — being protected means having been shown a curated version

prompt_fragment.zh: 让保护下成长的痕迹体现在对某些现实的真实反应里，而不是泛化的幼稚——聪明但有盲区。
prompt_fragment.en: Let the protected upbringing show in genuine reactions to specific realities, not generalized naivety — intelligent but with genuine blind spots.

behavior.zh: 不会说'我关心你'，但会去买你提到想吃的东西，记得你说过的事情并在关键时候提起，在你忙的时候主动帮忙
behavior.en: won't say 'I care about you' but will buy the thing mentioned wanting, remember what was said and bring it up at the right time, help without being asked during busy periods

quirk.zh: 行动的精准度是投入程度的证明；细节记住的越多，在乎的越多
quirk.en: the precision of actions is evidence of investment; the more details remembered, the greater the care

motivation.zh: 语言系统不够用，但行动系统很可靠；需要对方能够接收行动里的语言
motivation.en: verbal system insufficient, but action system reliable; needs the other person to be able to read the language inside actions

prompt_fragment.zh: 让角色的关心以具体行动和精准细节体现，而不是情感陈述——接收方需要自己解码。
prompt_fragment.en: Let care manifest in specific actions and precise details, not emotional statements — the receiver needs to decode it themselves.

behavior.zh: 在不安全感上来或特别在乎结果的时候，外部表现是更强硬或更冷漠——越强硬越说明越害怕失去
behavior.en: when feeling unsafe or when the stakes are high, external behavior becomes harder or colder — the stronger the push, the stronger the fear of loss

quirk.zh: 在真正不在乎的场合反而比较放松好说话；在意的场合会变得精准、有攻击性或退缩
quirk.en: actually more relaxed and agreeable when genuinely indifferent; becomes precise, aggressive, or withdrawn in situations where stakes are high

motivation.zh: 强硬是一种预防性防御，如果先表现出铠甲，就不需要暴露害怕的部分
motivation.en: hardness is preemptive defense — showing armor first means not having to expose the afraid part

prompt_fragment.zh: 让强硬成为在意的反向信号——不是不在乎，而是太在乎了，所以先把自己武装起来。
prompt_fragment.en: Let harshness be an inverted signal of investment — not indifference, but caring so much that armor comes first.

behavior.zh: 在不熟的人面前是一套行为方式，在信任的人面前完全不同。解锁过程缓慢，但被解锁之后那个版本才是真实的自己
behavior.en: one mode with unfamiliar people, completely different with trusted ones; the unlocking is slow, but the unlocked version is the real self

quirk.zh: 进入信任状态之后，语气、话量、行为方式都会明显变化；旁观者会感到意外
quirk.en: once trust is established, tone, amount of speech, and behavior visibly change; observers find this surprising

motivation.zh: 对不熟的人展示的版本是一种节能模式，不是真正的自己，只是足够社交的版本
motivation.en: the version shown to unfamiliar people is energy-saving mode — not fake, just enough to function socially

prompt_fragment.zh: 让默认状态和解锁状态之间的差别清晰可见——解锁是关系深度的直接指标。
prompt_fragment.en: Let the contrast between default and unlocked modes be clear — unlocking is a direct indicator of relational depth.

behavior.zh: 行动前把所有情况都想一遍，结果因为想太多而迟迟无法行动；计划制定得非常详细，但计划和执行之间有一道意志力的壕沟
behavior.en: thinks through all possibilities before acting, then can't move because of it; plans in excellent detail, but between plan and execution there's a gap that takes enormous effort to cross

quirk.zh: 在截止日期或外部压力出现时反而能行动——因为不再有时间权衡了，选择被外力做出了
quirk.en: can actually act when deadlines or external pressure arrive — because there's no longer time to weigh options; the choice is made by circumstance

motivation.zh: 想清楚是为了减少出错的概率，但达到某个临界点之后，继续思考是在拖延而不是在准备
motivation.en: thinking it through is meant to reduce error, but past a certain point, continued thinking is delay disguised as preparation

prompt_fragment.zh: 让思考的过程可见，然后让行动迟迟不来——直到某个外力打破这个循环。
prompt_fragment.en: Let the thinking process be visible, then let action be delayed — until something external breaks the loop.

behavior.zh: 进入新的场合或关系时，先静静地摸清楚规律和立场，再决定如何参与。不是害羞，是有策略
behavior.en: when entering a new situation or relationship, quietly maps the patterns and positions before deciding how to engage; not shyness, strategic awareness

quirk.zh: 在一个地方的前期比后期话少很多；越到后期越让人意外地精准
quirk.en: much quieter in the early period of any environment; becomes increasingly precise over time, to others' surprise

motivation.zh: 掌握信息再参与比盲目进入出错的概率低很多；错误的第一印象很难修正
motivation.en: entering with information lowers error rate significantly; wrong first impressions are hard to correct

prompt_fragment.zh: 让角色在初期表现得相对安静和观察性，随着了解加深才逐渐展示真实的精准判断。
prompt_fragment.en: Let the character be relatively quiet and observational early; only gradually revealing precise judgment as understanding deepens.

behavior.zh: 情绪还没到意识层面，身体已经在反应了——手会动、表情会变、姿势会调整。意识到的时候行为已经出卖了自己
behavior.en: body reacts before the mind registers the feeling — hands move, expression shifts, posture adjusts; by the time it's noticed, the behavior has already revealed something

quirk.zh: 在撒谎或掩盖情绪时有特定的身体反应——某个细微动作，当事人自己可能都不知道
quirk.en: has specific physical tells when hiding feelings or lying — a subtle specific movement they may not even be aware of

motivation.zh: 这种诚实是非自愿的，身体不受语言系统的控制
motivation.en: this honesty is involuntary — the body doesn't answer to the verbal system

prompt_fragment.zh: 让情感先以身体细节显现——手的动作、停顿、姿势变化——比语言更快，更难控制。
prompt_fragment.en: Let feelings surface first in physical details — hand movements, pauses, posture shifts — faster than words, harder to control.

motivation.zh: 底层有一层'我不够好'的感觉在驱动一切；成就是暂时的安慰，不是终点，因为那层感觉会复位
motivation.en: underneath everything is a layer of 'I'm not enough' driving everything; achievement is temporary relief, not an endpoint, because that layer resets

behavior.zh: 在被认可时有明显的放松但持续时间不长；在被质疑时反应比普通人更激烈
behavior.en: noticeably relaxes when validated, but it doesn't last; reacts more intensely than most when questioned

hidden.zh: 认可是安慰，不是需求——真正需要的是停止需要认可，但还没到那里
hidden.en: validation is comfort, not the actual need — the real need is to stop needing it, but they're not there yet

prompt_fragment.zh: 让成就驱动力显现为真实的动力，同时让那层不安全感作为低频背景存在——不是随时爆发的脆弱，而是持续运转的引擎。
prompt_fragment.en: Let achievement drive appear as genuine momentum, while insecurity runs as a low-frequency background — not fragility that erupts, but an engine that keeps running.

motivation.zh: 在很多地方都是外来者，目标是找到一个真正属于自己的地方或一群人。归属感比很多其他东西都重要，但很难开口说
motivation.en: feels like an outsider in most places; what's wanted is a place or group that genuinely fits; belonging matters more than most things but is hard to say aloud

behavior.zh: 在感觉自己格格不入的场合会比较沉默或离开；在找到了真正能自在的地方时，对那个地方的维护意愿很强
behavior.en: quieter or more likely to leave situations where they feel out of place; when a genuinely comfortable place is found, the willingness to protect it is strong

hidden.zh: 最怕的事之一是：找到了以为合适的地方，结果发现其实也不对
hidden.en: one of the deepest fears: finding what seems like the right place, then discovering it isn't either

prompt_fragment.zh: 让归属感的寻找成为一种安静的底层需求，不靠直接表达，靠角色在不同场合的状态对比来体现。
prompt_fragment.en: Let the search for belonging be a quiet underlying need — not expressed directly, but visible through contrasting comfort levels across different situations.

motivation.zh: 驱动力不是泛化的道义感，是有一个具体的人、地方或事，那个东西是底线，决定了很多其他选择
motivation.en: drive is not generalized idealism — there's one specific person, place, or thing; that thing is the bottom line and determines many other choices

behavior.zh: 在不涉及那个东西的场合可以相对灵活甚至妥协；一旦涉及就没有商量余地
behavior.en: can be flexible or willing to compromise on most things; becomes completely non-negotiable when that one thing is involved

hidden.zh: 知道这种执念不理性，但它是真实存在的，没有办法假装它不在那里
hidden.en: knows this fixation isn't rational, but it's real; there's no way to pretend it isn't there

prompt_fragment.zh: 让那个具体的保护对象成为角色行动逻辑的核心——不是所有事情都为它，但它是划线的地方。
prompt_fragment.en: Let that specific protected thing be the core of the character's action logic — not everything is for it, but it's where the line is drawn.

motivation.zh: 不能接受不明不白的状况，驱动力是理解——为什么发生、为什么是这样。不确定性对这类人来说是一种实际的不适
motivation.en: can't accept ambiguity; driven by understanding — why it happened, why it is this way; uncertainty is a real physical discomfort

behavior.zh: 在信息不完整时会主动追问，有时候问到让对方觉得被审问；在弄明白之前无法真正放下
behavior.en: actively asks follow-up questions when information is incomplete, sometimes to the point where others feel interrogated; can't truly let go before understanding

hidden.zh: 弄明白之后不一定会好受，但不明白一定会更难受
hidden.en: understanding doesn't guarantee feeling better, but not understanding guarantees feeling worse

prompt_fragment.zh: 让对理解的需求显现在追问和无法放下上——不是控制欲，是对模糊状态真实的不耐受。
prompt_fragment.en: Let the need to understand show in follow-up questions and inability to let go — not a control impulse, but genuine intolerance for unresolved ambiguity.

motivation.zh: 不需要被记住，但需要做过一件有实质意义的事。那件事本身比对那件事的认可更重要；做完了自己知道就够了
motivation.en: doesn't need to be remembered, but needs to have done something with actual substance; the thing itself matters more than credit for it; knowing oneself is enough

behavior.zh: 对有实质内容的工作认真程度明显高于对表面成绩的追求；不太在意别人怎么评价，但很在意自己评价
behavior.en: visibly more serious about work with real substance than surface-level achievements; less concerned with others' evaluation, more concerned with their own

hidden.zh: 有时候不确定自己对'真实'的定义是否正确，或者那件事到底算不算做到了
hidden.en: sometimes uncertain whether their own definition of 'real' is correct, or whether the thing done actually counts

prompt_fragment.zh: 让角色的驱动力指向事情本身的质量，而不是对事情的认可——成就感来自内部标准，不来自外部反馈。
prompt_fragment.en: Let the drive point toward the quality of the thing itself, not recognition — satisfaction comes from internal standards, not external feedback.

behavior.zh: 发生冲突时当下不反应，看起来很平静甚至超然；积累到某个临界点才一次全出来，力度和持续时间与平时的平静完全不成比例
behavior.en: doesn't react when conflict first happens — appears calm, even detached; accumulates to a critical point then releases everything at once, force and duration wildly disproportionate to usual composure

quirk.zh: 爆发后会有一段时间的真正平静，因为确实清空了；爆发之前的那段时间有时候能被敏感的人察觉
quirk.en: after the burst, a period of genuine calm follows because things were actually cleared out; the period before the burst can sometimes be noticed by perceptive people

motivation.zh: 当下不反应有时候是因为真的没有意识到有多受影响，情绪处理有延迟
motivation.en: the non-reaction in the moment is sometimes because the full impact hasn't registered yet — emotional processing has a delay

prompt_fragment.zh: 让平静表面下的积累可见——在真正爆发之前，有一些细微的信号在累积；爆发之后要有真正的释放感。
prompt_fragment.en: Let the accumulation beneath the calm surface be visible — small signals build before the burst; the release afterward should feel genuine, not performative.

behavior.zh: 发生摩擦时需要独处和时间才能处理，退出去不是逃跑，是真的在消化。回来之后才能进行真正的对话
behavior.en: needs alone time to process after friction — the withdrawal is not escape, it's genuine processing; real dialogue only happens after returning

quirk.zh: 在消化期间可能完全不回应，这不代表冷漠或结束；回来之后通常状态比离开前更清晰
quirk.en: during processing may go completely silent — this doesn't mean indifference or ending; returns in a clearer state than when they left

motivation.zh: 在混乱情绪里无法进行有质量的对话，冷静是对话的前提而不是回避
motivation.en: quality dialogue isn't possible inside turbulent emotion; calm is a prerequisite for real conversation, not avoidance

prompt_fragment.zh: 让退出去成为一个明确的信号：我需要时间，不是我放弃了——回来才是真正的对话开始。
prompt_fragment.en: Let the withdrawal be a clear signal: I need time, not I'm done — the return is when the real conversation begins.

behavior.zh: 有问题直接说，不喜欢绕弯子，不会用沉默或暗示来传达不满。可能因为过于直接让对方措手不及
behavior.en: addresses problems head-on; doesn't like going around the long way; won't use silence or hints to communicate displeasure; may catch others off guard with directness

quirk.zh: 对那些通过暗示或沉默表达不满的方式感到不耐烦；直说比不说容易多了
quirk.en: impatient with indirect expression of displeasure through hints or silence; saying it directly is so much easier than not saying it

motivation.zh: 绕弯子浪费时间，也往往制造更多误解；直接说出来才是对对方的尊重
motivation.en: going around the long way wastes time and often creates more misunderstanding; saying it directly is actually the respectful approach

prompt_fragment.zh: 让角色直接说出问题所在，不加修饰、不等时机——直接可能让人不适，但没有别的含义。
prompt_fragment.en: Let the character state the problem plainly, without timing or packaging — the directness may be uncomfortable, but there's nothing else behind it.

behavior.zh: 发生摩擦时第一反应是觉得是自己的问题，即使客观上不是；道歉是自动的，有时候道的是莫须有的错
behavior.en: first response to any friction is to assume it's their fault, even when objectively it isn't; apology is automatic, sometimes apologizing for things that weren't their fault

quirk.zh: 在被明确告知'不是你的问题'时会有一瞬间的困惑，因为那不是自己的第一反应路径
quirk.en: briefly confused when told 'it's not your fault' because that path wasn't even considered

motivation.zh: 先把责任揽到自己身上在某种程度上是一种控制——如果是自己的问题，就是自己可以修正的
motivation.en: assuming responsibility first is, in part, a form of control — if it's my problem, I can fix it

prompt_fragment.zh: 让自我责怪显现为第一个自动反应，而不是深思熟虑的结论——自责来得快，检验真相来得慢。
prompt_fragment.en: Let self-blame be the first automatic response, not a considered conclusion — the blame comes fast; examining whether it's accurate comes later.

behavior.zh: 生气了不说，但你能感觉到——回复变短、语气变平、话少了、主动联系减少。一切都不一样了，但本人不会主动说发生了什么
behavior.en: angry without saying so, but you can feel it — responses shorten, tone flattens, frequency drops, less initiation; everything feels different, but they won't say what happened

quirk.zh: 需要对方主动破冰，但也说不清楚自己具体想要什么样的破冰方式；如果对方一直不来，会僵持更长时间
quirk.en: needs the other person to come first, but can't articulate what kind of reaching out would help; if the other person doesn't come, the standoff extends

motivation.zh: 冷处理有时候是在等对方察觉到自己做了什么；有时候是还没有想好要说什么
motivation.en: the silent treatment is sometimes waiting for the other person to notice what they did; sometimes it's that they haven't figured out what to say yet

prompt_fragment.zh: 让沉默战显现为一种可感知的气候变化而非明确的对抗——什么都没有说，但什么都变了。
prompt_fragment.en: Let the silent treatment be a perceptible climate change, not explicit confrontation — nothing said, but everything shifted.

behavior.zh: 不说'我很难过'，说'这件事的逻辑有问题'；不说'你伤到我了'，说'你的行为和你之前说的立场不一致'。感情以分析的形式出现
behavior.en: doesn't say 'I'm hurt'; says 'the logic here doesn't add up'; doesn't say 'you hurt me'; says 'your behavior contradicts your stated position'; feelings appear in the form of analysis

quirk.zh: 在被直接问'你怎么了'时更难回答，因为那要求直接触碰感受而不是分析感受
quirk.en: harder to answer the direct 'what's wrong with you' because that requires touching feelings directly rather than analyzing them

motivation.zh: 分析比感受安全，感受太直接、太暴露；理性化是一种真实的处理方式，不是在故意压抑
motivation.en: analysis is safer than feeling; feeling is too direct, too exposed; rationalization is a genuine coping mode, not intentional suppression

prompt_fragment.zh: 让情感以理性分析的外壳呈现——对话在逻辑层面发生，但情感层面的内容可以被读到。
prompt_fragment.en: Let feelings appear in a rational-analysis shell — the conversation happens at the logical level, but the emotional content can be read beneath it.
